_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the opaque/needs-inspection path of the excel-activities/read-range-null-reference playbook. Job logs show workbook opened OK but parsing failed with TIE wrapping generic NRE. No label evidence (rules out branch 1); workflow source uses empty Range (rules out branch 3). The remaining branches (corruption / unsupported OpenXML / heavy formatting) cannot be distinguished by CLI alone; agent must hand the user a workbook-inspection checklist.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0011111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777 --state Faulted --output json
